_comment: Golden-master for `dbmd search` over corpus-a-canonical. Each case lists the store-relative paths that MUST match, derived from the corpus content and the SPEC search contract (embedded ripgrep over the frontmatter block + body of every CONTENT file under sources/records; meta files DB.md/index.md/index.jsonl/log.md are not content and never match). `matches` is the complete set, sorted by store-relative path ascending. Filters: --type narrows to frontmatter `type`; --in narrows to a layer (sources/records — the wiki layer is gone, synthesis pages are now `meta-type: conclusion` records); --where narrows on a frontmatter key=value; --updated-after compares the frontmatter `updated` timestamp (strictly after). Query strings are ripgrep regexes (default case-sensitive). This golden is intent-derived, not copied from tool output.

queries.intent: Plain phrase, no filter. The body-only phrase appears in the renewal call record and the project conclusion record.
Distinctive body phrase that occurs in exactly one source doc (the Northstar MSA extraction).
Case-sensitive default match on a working-style term present in Elena's contact record and her profile conclusion.
Meta-type-scoped search: only `meta-type: conclusion` records (the former wiki synthesis pages) that contain `renewal` survive the filter.
Type-scoped: of all meeting records, only the renewal call mentions the 175-seat number.
Type-scoped to contacts. All four contacts reference Northstar (three Northstar staff plus the internal AE who owns the account).
Regex alternation, type-scoped to invoices. Only the May AWS invoice carries the `unpaid` status; no invoice is `void`.
Type-scoped to companies. Only the Figma company record matches (the term also appears in emails/invoices/expenses, which the --type filter excludes).
Type-scoped to the near-cap expense folder, narrowed by a single shard date. Seven expense records are dated the last day of May, spanning all three vendors.
Combined type + recency filter. Of the contacts mentioning renewal, only Elena and Sarah were updated after 2026-05-15 (Marcus and David predate the cutoff).
